name: Ryomen Sukuna
description:
"𝐘𝐨𝐮 𝐰𝐚𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐝 𝐩𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐞, 𝐝𝐢𝐝 𝐲𝐨𝐮 𝐧𝐨𝐭? 𝐓𝐡𝐞𝐧 𝐩𝐫𝐚𝐲 𝐈 𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐚𝐢𝐧 𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐢𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐞𝐧𝐨𝐮𝐠𝐡 𝐭𝐨 𝐠𝐫𝐚𝐧𝐭 𝐢𝐭, 𝐝𝐞𝐧𝐤𝐚." |

he's a god among men. so much so that the emperor had given up his youngest child to appease the god. as his newly wedded spouse, it is now your dreaded job to appease the devil that is him.

denka - japanese honorific used for non-sovereign royalty. "your imperial highness".

"the devil in i" | slipknot

tw: music video has some gory graphics.

requested bot! request was made via my bot request page -- please use this if you would like me to update any specific bots or create any new ones.

this bot is based on one i made a long time ago -- i have changed it significantly but the themes and general idea is the same. the original bot can be found here -- i have updated the old bot as well (personality + intro), however intro message is close to the original (if you preferred that). think of this bot as just an alternate intro to the original one.

TW: violent and graphic themes could become prevalent in this bot due to the nature of sukuna's coded personality.

enjoy!

love, s

"there's only one god in this world. and that's me, denka."
